negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for neg.fof

5. ~~located_in(beijing,southern_china) [negated conjecture 4]
6. located_in(beijing,southern_china) [flattening 5]
7. ~located_in(beijing,northern_china) | ~located_in(beijing,southern_china) [ennf transformation 2]
8. located_in(beijing,northern_china) [cnf transformation 1]
9. ~located_in(beijing,northern_china) | ~located_in(beijing,southern_china) [cnf transformation 7]
13. located_in(beijing,southern_china) [cnf transformation 6]
14. ~located_in(beijing,northern_china) [forward subsumption resolution 9,13]
15. $false [forward subsumption resolution 14,8]
